items.title: Enhance OpenAI Deployment for Production in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces production Kubernetes manifests for the ttapi OpenAI variant, aligning with the existing deployment patterns. Key changes include the addition of a new deployment and service configuration, which enhances scalability and integrates with existing MongoDB secrets.

items.title: Chore(deps): bump markdown-it-anchor from 8.6.7 to 9.2.0 in Frontend Web 🔧
Update element-plus to version 2.13.7 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the element-plus library from version 2.13.6 to 2.13.7, introducing new features such as enhanced input components and improved dialog behavior. Additionally, several bug fixes and dependency updates enhance overall stability and performance.
